PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. VEGA, SR. RECOVER $3,381.00 AND JORGE M. VEGA, JR. RECOVER $1075.00 FROM DEFENDANT CRAIG M. RANKIN, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
